metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills for productivity, communication, and daily workflows.

plugins.name: 1on1-prep
plugins.description: Prepare for a 1:1 by pulling context from the vault, Granola, and Slack DMs.

plugins.name: communication
plugins.description: Communication framework: BLUF, Just-In-Time Context, and Zoom In. Always active when drafting messages, docs, or verbal talking points.

plugins.name: copy-to-clipboard
plugins.description: Copy content to the system clipboard, bypassing terminal line wrapping.

plugins.name: eod-wrap-up
plugins.description: End-of-day review across Granola meetings, Outlook email, Slack, and tomorrow's calendar. Fully self-contained: no other skills, config, or vault required.

plugins.name: follow-up
plugins.description: Capture a follow-up item to revisit later without losing context.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Stress-test a plan or design by interviewing the user one question at a time.

plugins.name: morning-briefing
plugins.description: Morning briefing across calendar, overnight email and Slack, with light 1:1 prep. Fully self-contained: no other skills, config, or vault required.

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: Obsidian vault layout, weekly note conventions, and action item format.

plugins.name: onboarding
plugins.description: Bootstrap a new Claude Code workspace: identity, vault, scheduled tasks, and MCP connections.

plugins.name: projects
plugins.description: Project lifecycle management: create, resume, save, and list projects in the vault.

plugins.name: tend-garden
plugins.description: Validate and commit changes to the skill garden repo.

plugins.name: user-context
plugins.description: User identity and tool configuration that skills read for personalization.

plugins.name: weekly-digest
plugins.description: Weekly summary across Granola meetings, Jira, Slack, and calendar. Writes a retrospective to the weekly note.

plugins.name: write-a-skill
plugins.description: Create, review, or lint agent skills following the directory-per-skill convention.

plugins.name: writing-audit
plugins.description: Audit a document as an informed-but-not-expert reader.

plugins.name: youtube-transcript
plugins.description: Download, persist, and analyze a YouTube video transcript.
